REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT MICHELLE FULLER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF ADEQUATELY PLEADS FRAUD AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. NO CLAIM IS TIME-BARRED, AS PLAINTIFF SEEKS DISCRETIONARY RELIEF AND PLEADS CAUSES OF ACTION BEYOND WRONGFUL EVICTION. SEE HYPERTOUCH, INC. V. VALUECLICK, INC. (2011), 192 CAL. APP. 4TH 805, 842. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Continued To Sep-07-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Hooshmand, Esq, and Jenny Jin Esq. (415-318-5709) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Rebecca Grites.
No other Appearance.

Plaintiff reports both matters are uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHELLE FULLER's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is DENIED. Plaintiff adequately pleads fraud. Punitive damages are available under multiple counts of the complaint. The motion improperly raises factual disputes. Order is signed in open court.(see scanned order for details)Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Hooshmand, Esq, and Jenny Jin Esq. (415-318-5709) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Rebecca Grites.
No other Appearance.

Plaintiff reports both matters are uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHELLE FULLER's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Plaintiff adequately pleads fraud and intentional infliction of emotional distress. No claim is time-barred, as plaintiff seeks discretionary relief and pleads causes of action beyond wrongful eviction. See Hypertouch, Inc. v. ValueClick, Inc. (2011), 192 Cal. App. 4th 805, 842. Order is signed in open court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Continued To Jun-20-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT MICHELLE FULLER DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to June 20, 2016. CCP 170.6 on file. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
